channel.title: Technology on cringe.live
channel.description: Recent content in Technology on cringe.live

item.title: Bad Idea
item.description: Is your data worthless? Did a hacker deposit some bitcoin in your wallet after he looked at your poor files when he tried to ransomware attack you? Well my friend, then you absolutely don’t need to run any Anti-Virus software! A bit back I found this perfect piece of juvenile neglectfulness, which turns off Real-Time protection if you enter it into a PowerShell running as Administrator. 1 Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring $true I took it a bit further and added my own sudo command in Windows and pops open an Administrator terminal, and since I added this line as a function, I can now accomplish in a few keystrokes what used to take:

item.title: Alle Farben
item.description: 1 2 3 4 # Change directory to my blog in the most extravagant way. function blog { Set-Location -Path (Join-Path -Path $env:USERPROFILE -ChildPath "code\blog") } Okay, he got a bit out of hand with this one, but.. I did torture ChatGPT today with some more Python and Excel. This took me a really long time to make, okay? Let’s make him extract color values from column A without the header and put them in a JSON file.
